object.name: InputMediaSticker
object.description: Represents a sticker file to be sent.
object.html_description: Represents a sticker file to be sent.
object.rst_description: Represents a sticker file to be sent.

annotations.description: Type of the result, must be sticker
annotations.rst_description: Type of the result, must be *sticker*
annotations.name: type

annotations.description: File to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended), pass an HTTP URL for Telegram to get a .WEBP sticker from the Internet, or pass 'attach://<file_attach_name>' to upload a new .WEBP, .TGS, or .WEBM sticker using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files
annotations.html_description: File to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended), pass an HTTP URL for Telegram to get a .WEBP sticker from the Internet, or pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” to upload a new .WEBP, .TGS, or .WEBM sticker using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files »
annotations.rst_description: File to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended), pass an HTTP URL for Telegram to get a .WEBP sticker from the Internet, or pass 'attach://<file_attach_name>' to upload a new .WEBP, .TGS, or .WEBM sticker using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. :ref:`More information on Sending Files » <sending-files>`
annotations.name: media

annotations.description: Emoji associated with the sticker; only for just uploaded stickers
annotations.html_description: Optional. Emoji associated with the sticker; only for just uploaded stickers
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Emoji associated with the sticker; only for just uploaded stickers
annotations.name: emoji
